# Aditya Wagh
> Personal website with a blog, project highlights, and research interests.

## Website
- URL: https://adityamwagh.github.io/
- Language: English

## Sections
- / : Homepage with bio, projects, and contact links.
- /blog/ : Blog posts on robotics, machine learning, and related topics.
